publicSurface.rule: index.html is both the local game entry shell and the itch.io HTML5 entry after packaging.
UI Designer owns shell hierarchy, metadata, public copy clarity, iframe readability, and store-page fit.

rules.rule: Keep game-specific runtime files inside orbital-courier/.
Shared ai_chat, deploy, and future game folders stay outside this folder.
Validate through a local static server at /orbital-courier/.
